title: mandevilla mollissima
intro: Mandevilla mollissima, also known as the long vine mandevilla, is a type of evergreen flowering vine native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Mandevilla mollissima include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
